tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: Specialized tools to help you get the job done faster.
tools.propertyReportCardDesc: Assess property health across lawns, trees, plants, beds, irrigation, and infrastructure. Generate a scored report card with recommended services.
tools.pdfFieldPlacerDesc: Visually place fillable form fields on any PDF. Draw boxes, assign field types, and export coordinates.
tools.calculatorDesc: Material calculators, unit converters, chemical mixing math, and system sizing tools for landscape work.
tools.plowMapperDesc: Snow removal route planning with Google Maps, AI-powered property analysis, and site grouping.
tools.processAuditorDesc: Audit and review business processes for efficiency and compliance.
tools.integrationWizardDesc: Connect third-party tools and services to streamline your workflow.
tools.leadQualifierDesc: Score and qualify incoming prospects to focus on the best opportunities.
